ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "driving_license" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the customer has a driving license (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Region code of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "previously_insured" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the customer was previously insured (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "vehicle_age" TEXT /* Age of the customer's vehicle */,
  "vehicle_damage" TEXT /* Indicator whether the customer's vehicle has damage (Yes or No) */,
  "annual_income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the policy */,
  "annual_premium" INTEGER /* Annual premium for the policy */,
  "policy_sales_channel" INTEGER /* Channel through which the policy was sold */,
  "vintage" INTEGER /* Vintage of the policy (time since policy was issued) */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g. liability, collision, comprehensive) */,
  "coverage_amount" INTEGER /* Coverage amount for the policy */,
  "deductible" INTEGER /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the policy */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policy_sales_channel FOREIGN KEY ("policy_sales_channel") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of sales channel (e.g. agent, online, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_sales_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data entry */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was sold */,
  "sales_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of sales for the policy */,
  "commission" INTEGER /* Commission earned from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_sales_data_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy change */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was changed */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the changes made to the policy */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g. premium update, coverage update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_changes_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy under which the claim was made */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" INTEGER /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g. pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g. credit card, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_value" INTEGER /* Value of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who is the driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_license" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the driver has a license (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "driver_experience" INTEGER /* Years of driving experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
